grant_title: Wabanaki Tribal Farm to School Initiative
geographic_restrictions: Aroostook, Penobscot, and Washington counties in Maine, with a focus on Wabanaki tribal communities
project_area: Food systems, Indigenous foods, agricultural education, and youth nutrition programs
demographic_requirements: Primarily serves Wabanaki youth (Maliseet, Mi’kmaq, Passamaquoddy, and Penobscot) but also includes non-native youth in the target areas
eligibility_summary: Open to organizations that can implement farm-to-school programs in Wabanaki tribal communities and surrounding areas, with a focus on connecting tribal farmers, gatherers, and food producers to youth meals and educational programs.
